theme.strategy: Light mode heavily preferred for organic/fresh feel. Dark mode reserved for Footer or specific high-contrast 'Night Market' sections.

headings.name: Playfair Display
headings.usage: All H1-H3 headings. Adds trust, tradition, and an editorial feel.

body.name: Manrope
body.usage: Body text, UI elements, buttons. Clean, modern, highly legible.

accent.name: Caveat
accent.usage: Small signatures, 'Farmer's Note' labels, organic badges.

primary.name: Deep Moss Green
primary.usage: Main actions, buttons, active states. Represents growth and freshness.

secondary.name: Terracotta
secondary.usage: Accents, sale tags, 'Urgent' actions. Earthy warmth.

background.name: Bone White
background.usage: Main background. NEVER pure white (#FFFFFF) except for card surfaces.

colors.rules: Avoid neon greens. Use matte finishes. Textures (grain) > Gradients.

grid_system.marketing: Bento Grid (Mode A). Asymmetric. Mix of 4x4, 2x4, 2x2 cells.
grid_system.listing: Masonry or flexible grid with 'breathing room' (gap-8+).
grid_system.dashboard: High Density Grid (Mode B). Compact but legible.

buttons.style: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-border/60 shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] transition-all duration-300
cards.product_card: Aspect ratio 3:4 for images. Minimal text below. 'Add' button floats on image hover.
cards.feature_card: Padding p-8 or p-10. Icon left-aligned.

inputs.style: bg-white border-border rounded-lg h-12 px-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all

visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle SVG noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the main background to simulate paper/organic texture.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: md: rounded-xl, lg: rounded-2xl, full: rounded-full. Avoid sharp edges unless for specific brutalist sections.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'Phosphor Icons' (Duotone or Regular) or 'Lucide' with thin strokes.

hero_background.usage: Hero section background or split visual

farmer_highlight.usage: About Us or 'Meet Your Farmer' section

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure primary green (#2F5233) is used on light backgrounds. Use lighter green (#4ADE80) only for dark mode accents.
accessibility.data_test_ids: REQUIRED. All interactive elements must have 'data-testid'. Format: 'component-role-context' (e.g., 'button-submit-login').
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings are mandatory. Use 'ring-offset-2 ring-2 ring-primary'.

universal_guidelines.anti_slop: Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Do not center everything. Create visual tension with asymmetry.
universal_guidelines.motion: Use 'AnimatePresence' for page transitions. Stagger list items. Hover effects on everything interactive.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update tailwind.config.js to include the new colors (moss, terracotta, bone) and fonts (Playfair Display, Manrope).
3. Apply a global body background color of #F9F8F4 (Bone White).
4. Build the 'Bento Grid' component for the home page categories.
5. Ensure the 'Farmer Dashboard' uses the High Density grid layout, while the 'Customer Storefront' uses the Marketing/Masonry layout.
